plan_metadata.name: Teams Collaborator Agent debug in playground Copy
plan_metadata.description:
This is a new test plan. You can:

1. Record interactions using the VNC viewer (click 'Show VNC' and start recording)
2. Manually add steps one by one
3. Edit this description to describe your test workflow

Start by clicking 'Add Cell' below or begin recording your interactions!

steps.description: Click the "Apps for Microsoft 365" option in the dropdown menu under the "New Project" modal.
Click the "Teams Collaborator Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selection box.
Type ${{secret:AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY}} into the "Input Azure OpenAI service key now or set it later in the project" input box in the VS Code command palette.
Type text: 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY' into the 'Azure OpenAI Key' input field located in the top toolbar of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the input in the "Input Azure OpenAI service key" text field within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Type ${{env:AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT}} into the "Input Azure OpenAI service endpoint now or set it later in the project" prompt at the top of the VS Code window.
Press the Enter key to confirm the Azure OpenAI Endpoint URL input in the pop-up text field within Visual Studio Code.
Type 'gpt-4.1' into the "Input Azure OpenAI deployment name" prompt at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm the Azure OpenAI deployment name entered in the input field within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the Workspace Folder selection dialog under the header "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located."
Click the text input field labeled "Type a message..." at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface.
Type the text '@Collaborator find action items from the past 3 days' into the message input field at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams interface, within the "vscuse_app_F3NF0local" chat.

parameters.text: @Collaborator find action items from the past 3 days

steps.description: Press the "Enter" key to send the message "@Collaborator find action items from the past 3 days" in the Microsoft Teams chat input box.
